column1: # Arcana retrieval eval — labeled query set (fully committed; no private data).
# Format: TSV. Columns below. Set-valued groundTruth cells use '|' (any-of for broad franchises).
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored. Read by BOTH the JVM router-scoring test and the
# instrumented structured/semantic suite (one source of truth). See EVAL_METHODOLOGY.md.
# expectedRoute: Count | NftRedeemable | MostValuable | AddedInYear | FollowUp | Semantic  (the DEFENSIBLE
#   correct intent; a router disagreement is a measured misroute, not a fixture error).
# answerKind: structured | semantic | followup | router   (which scorer applies; 'router' = router-path only).
# groundTruth: structured -> expected count (derived INDEPENDENTLY from the committed CSV by
#   tools/eval/derive_ground_truth.py, not by the retriever); semantic -> item name(s); followup/router -> '-'.
#   Counts are unique entries (HobbyDB convention); '*' marks a value that drifts with price snapshots.
how many pops do I own
